description: Name for the virtual server. Must begin with an ASCII alphanumeric or underscore (_) character, and must contain only ASCII alphanumeric, underscore, hash (#), period (.), space, colon (:), at sign (@), equal sign (=), and hyphen (-) characters. Can be changed after the virtual server is created.
CLI Users: If the name includes one or more spaces, enclose the name in double or single quotation marks (for example, "my vserver" or 'my vserver').
Order number to be assigned to the service when it is bound to the lb vserver.
Service to bind to the virtual server.
Weight to assign to the specified service.
